title: Mission Control Dashboard

title: Build Agent Factory — pixel art pipeline visualization
description: Build a pixel art factory floor tab in Mission Control showing AI agents as characters moving tasks through pipeline stages (Backlog → Scanning → Analyzing → Alerting → Done). Mr. Shmack as main character, sub-agents as workers, cron jobs as moving task cards, live stats at bottom. Reference: user shared a screenshot of similar app called Factory.

title: Rebuild R&D Team tab to match Research Lab design
description: Redesign the R&D Council tab in Mission Control to match the Henry Research Lab screenshot. Key features: (1) Three tabs: Trend Radar, Opportunity Scanner, R&D Council. (2) Stats bar: total memos, council cost in $, last session timestamp, schedule. (3) Each memo card shows: memo number, agent role badge with color, category, date, large monospace title, status badge (NEEDS WORK/APPROVED/etc), tags, complexity, confidence %, cost. (4) PROBLEM and PROPOSAL sections in colored labels. (5) Full monospace terminal font throughout. (6) Track and display actual API cost per run. Reference screenshot saved in memory.
